data.body:
💎3-Million Downloads Celebration Gift💎

A thank-you gift for all Senseis that helped us reach 3-million Global downloads!
Check your mailbox for the celebration gift: Pyroxene x1,200!
(You can receive it until 2021/12/15 14:59 (UTC))
